title: Stripe Checkout metadata not sent
symptom: After a successful purchase using the Stripe Checkout plugin, the metadata fields in the charge object are empty.
not_this_if: Metadata appears in the charge object
root_cause: The metadata is associated with the Stripe Checkout session rather than the charge object. If a webhook is set up to trigger on charge events, it may not capture the metadata correctly since it is not stored in the charge object.
fix_steps: Set up a webhook to listen for Stripe Charge events
Use the payment_intent parameter from the charge event response
Call the 'List all Checkout Sessions' API with the payment_intent to retrieve the metadata
agent_instruction: Retrieve the metadata by listing all checkout sessions using the payment_intent from the charge event.
